response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match for this role. He brings 10+ years of full-stack experience with direct alignment on the primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, and MongoDB — and his current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework development, which is rare and directly relevant. His deep TDD culture, testing workshops, and custom testing tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial) exceed the testing expectations. The main gap is no explicit Nest.js experience, and Kotlin is absent from his profile, but neither is disqualifying given his demonstrated ability to pick up new frameworks across a very broad technology history.
strengths: Direct TypeScript/Node.js/React stack alignment with AWS CDK and MongoDB experience at Optilyz at scale
AI-agent development and MCP tooling at re:cinq — rare, high-value match for the AI agent requirement
Exceptionally strong testing culture: created testing frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), ran TDD/Selenium workshops, and applied TDD/trunk-based dev in production at RIDE Capital
concerns: Nest.js is the primary backend framework in the job spec but is not mentioned anywhere in the resume
Kotlin is absent from the skills list and employment history despite being a secondary stack requirement
Very broad technology spread (DLang, Swift, C++, PHP, Ember.js, D) could indicate fragmented depth rather than focused backend/frontend mastery
